name: ambient-desktop
description: A local-first developer workstation for durable, inspectable agentic work.
author: Mechanus Labs Inc.

scripts.dev:gmi-cloud: GMI_CLOUD_API_KEY_FILE=${GMI_CLOUD_API_KEY_FILE:-$(node scripts/resolve-gmi-cloud-key-file.mjs)} AMBIENT_PROVIDER=gmi-cloud pnpm run prepare:electron-native && GMI_CLOUD_API_KEY_FILE=${GMI_CLOUD_API_KEY_FILE:-$(node scripts/resolve-gmi-cloud-key-file.mjs)} AMBIENT_PROVIDER=gmi-cloud electron-vite dev
scripts.preview:gmi-cloud: GMI_CLOUD_API_KEY_FILE=${GMI_CLOUD_API_KEY_FILE:-$(node scripts/resolve-gmi-cloud-key-file.mjs)} AMBIENT_PROVIDER=gmi-cloud pnpm run prepare:electron-native && GMI_CLOUD_API_KEY_FILE=${GMI_CLOUD_API_KEY_FILE:-$(node scripts/resolve-gmi-cloud-key-file.mjs)} AMBIENT_PROVIDER=gmi-cloud node scripts/electron-vite-preview-cleanup.mjs
scripts.pack: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare:electron-native && electron-builder --dir --publish=never && pnpm run verify:packaged-native
scripts.dist: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare:electron-native && electron-builder --publish=never && pnpm run verify:packaged-native
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare:electron-native && electron-builder --mac --publish=never && pnpm run verify:packaged-native
scripts.dist:win: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare:electron-native && electron-builder --win --publish=never && pnpm run verify:packaged-native
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare:electron-native && electron-builder --linux --publish=never && pnpm run verify:packaged-native
scripts.test:callable-workflow-dogfood:proof: pnpm run prepare:node-native && AMBIENT_CALLABLE_WORKFLOW_DOGFOOD_EVIDENCE_OUT=test-results/callable-workflow-dogfood/latest.json pnpm exec vitest run src/main/callable-workflow/callableWorkflowDogfoodEvidence.test.ts -t "builds mutating child workflow dogfood evidence with restart repair proof"
scripts.test:callable-workflow-rehydration:proof: pnpm run prepare:node-native && AMBIENT_CALLABLE_WORKFLOW_REHYDRATION_EVIDENCE_OUT=test-results/callable-workflow-rehydration/latest.json pnpm exec vitest run src/main/callable-workflow/callableWorkflowRehydrationEvidence.test.ts -t "builds restart rehydration evidence for linked task artifacts, runs, progress, and usage"
scripts.test:subagents:lifecycle-edges:proof: AMBIENT_SUBAGENT_LIFECYCLE_EDGE_EVIDENCE_OUT=test-results/subagent-lifecycle-edges/latest.json pnpm exec vitest run src/main/subagents/subagentLifecycleEdgeEvidence.test.ts -t "builds lifecycle edge evidence for restart, stop, detach, cancel, retry, timeout, and partial results"

scripts.test:subagents:live:smoke: AMBIENT_PROVIDER=${AMBIENT_PROVIDER:-ambient} AMBIENT_SUBAGENT_LIVE=1 node scripts/run-live-node-test.mjs -- vitest run src/main/subagents/subagentPiToolLiveSmoke.live.test.ts -t "lets live Pi spawn a visible child thread with runtime events"
scripts.test:memory:tencent:live: AMBIENT_PROVIDER=ambient AMBIENT_LIVE_MODEL=${AMBIENT_LIVE_MODEL:-moonshotai/kimi-k2.7-code} AMBIENT_TENCENT_MEMORY_LIVE=1 pnpm exec vitest run src/main/memory/tencentdb/tencentMemoryLiveSmoke.live.test.ts
scripts.test:memory:tencent:offload:live: AMBIENT_PROVIDER=ambient AMBIENT_LIVE_MODEL=${AMBIENT_LIVE_MODEL:-moonshotai/kimi-k2.7-code} AMBIENT_TENCENT_MEMORY_LIVE=1 pnpm exec vitest run src/main/memory/tencentdb/tencentMemoryLiveSmoke.live.test.ts -t "injects short-term offload context from artifact-backed tool output"
scripts.test:memory:tencent:update:live: AMBIENT_PROVIDER=ambient AMBIENT_LIVE_MODEL=${AMBIENT_LIVE_MODEL:-moonshotai/kimi-k2.7-code} AMBIENT_TENCENT_MEMORY_LIVE=1 pnpm exec vitest run src/main/memory/tencentdb/tencentMemoryLiveSmoke.live.test.ts -t "updates a TencentDB L1 memory through chat and recalls the edit"
scripts.test:memory:tencent:rollout-review: AMBIENT_TENCENT_MEMORY_ROLLOUT_REVIEW_OUT=test-results/tencent-memory-rollout-review/latest.json pnpm exec vitest run src/main/agent/agentMemoryRolloutReviewEvidence.test.ts -t "writes configured rollout review artifact"
scripts.test:subagents:live:long-context-authori: AMBIENT_PROVIDER=${AMBIENT_PROVIDER:-ambient} AMBIENT_SUBAGENT_LIVE=1 node scripts/run-live-node-test.mjs -- vitest run src/main/subagents/subagentPiToolLiveSmoke.live.test.ts -t "lets a live child use long_context_process only on granted document roots"
scripts.test:subagents:live:approval-authority: AMBIENT_PROVIDER=${AMBIENT_PROVIDER:-ambient} AMBIENT_SUBAGENT_LIVE=1 node scripts/run-live-node-test.mjs -- vitest run src/main/subagents/subagentPiToolLiveSmoke.live.test.ts -t "surfaces live child file authority approval requests to the parent"
scripts.test:subagents:live:browser-approval: AMBIENT_PROVIDER=${AMBIENT_PROVIDER:-ambient} AMBIENT_SUBAGENT_LIVE=1 node scripts/run-live-node-test.mjs -- vitest run src/main/subagents/subagentPiToolLiveSmoke.live.test.ts -t "surfaces live child browser authority approval requests to the parent"
scripts.test:subagents:live:authority: pnpm run test:subagents:live:long-context-authority && pnpm run test:subagents:live:approval-authority && pnpm run test:subagents:live:browser-approval
scripts.test:subagents:live-confidence:workflow-: pnpm run test:workflow-local-file:live && pnpm run test:workflow-ui-dogfood:phase0-live && pnpm run test:callable-workflow-dogfood:proof && pnpm run test:callable-workflow-rehydration:proof

pnpm run test:workflow-local-file:live && pnpm run test:workflow-ui-dogfood:phase1-live:credentialed && pnpm run test:callable-workflow-dogfood:proof && pnpm run test:callable-workflow-rehydration:proof
scripts.test:subagents:live-confidence:restart-r: pnpm run test:subagents:replay-diagnostics && pnpm run test:subagents:lifecycle-edges:proof
scripts.test:subagents:live-confidence:unit: pnpm exec vitest run scripts/harness-runtime.test.mjs scripts/subagent-live-confidence.test.mjs
scripts.test:subagents:release-gate:live: pnpm run test:callable-workflow-dogfood:proof && pnpm run test:callable-workflow-rehydration:proof && pnpm run test:subagents:lifecycle-edges:proof && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:authority -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:workflow -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:workflow-broader -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:local-runtime -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:restart-repair -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:lifecycle-edges -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:desktop-dogfood -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:deterministic && node scripts/subagent-release-gate.mjs --require-live
scripts.test:subagents:release-gate:graduation: pnpm run test:callable-workflow-dogfood:proof && pnpm run test:callable-workflow-rehydration:proof && pnpm run test:subagents:lifecycle-edges:proof && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:authority -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:workflow -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:workflow-broader -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:local-runtime -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:restart-repair -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:lifecycle-edges -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:live-confidence:desktop-dogfood -- --allow-blocked && pnpm run test:subagents:desktop-dogfood-repeat -- --require-ready && pnpm run test:workflow-jitter-release-gate:release-profile && pnpm run subagents:live-history-report -- --require-ready && pnpm run test:subagents:deterministic && node scripts/subagent-release-gate.mjs --require-live --require-maturity-history
scripts.lint:report: node scripts/report-command.mjs lint pnpm exec eslint "src/**/*.{js,mjs,cjs,ts,tsx}" "scripts/**/*.{js,mjs,cjs}" --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.format:report: node scripts/report-command.mjs prettier pnpm exec prettier . --check --ignore-unknown
scripts.simplification:v3:phase6:check: pnpm run simplification:v3:scorecard:check && pnpm run simplification:v3:guardrails:check && pnpm run format:report
scripts.test:local-runtime-control:proof-minicpm: AMBIENT_LOCAL_RUNTIME_CONTROL_PROOF_OUT=test-results/local-runtime-control-proof/latest.json pnpm exec vitest run src/main/mini-cpm/miniCpmVisionProvider.test.ts -t "stops MiniCPM-V without uninstalling"
scripts.test:local-runtime-control:proof-subagen: AMBIENT_LOCAL_RUNTIME_CONTROL_PROOF_OUT=test-results/local-runtime-control-proof/latest.json pnpm exec vitest run src/main/local-runtime/localRuntimeInventory.test.ts -t "joins active sub-agent leases"
scripts.test:local-runtime-control:proof-stopped: AMBIENT_LOCAL_RUNTIME_CONTROL_PROOF_OUT=test-results/local-runtime-control-proof/latest.json pnpm exec vitest run src/renderer/src/localRuntimeControlProofArtifacts.test.ts -t "writes stopped-provider display proof"

scripts.test:browser-login: AMBIENT_BROWSER_LOGIN_INTEGRATION=1 pnpm exec vitest run src/main/browser/browserService.test.ts -t "managed Chrome"
